mapper.insert: insert into t_fun_memory (memory_no, begin_time, end_time, fun_duration, fun_type, fun_app, fun_consume, fun_content, memory_place, memory_place_detail, memory_images, memory_source, memory_owner, row_memory_no, memory_status) values (#{memoryNo}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{funDuration}, #{funType}, #{funApp}, #{funConsume}, #{funContent}, #{memoryPlace}, #{memoryPlaceDetail}, #{memoryImages}, #{memorySource}, #{memoryOwner}, #{rowMemoryNo}, #{memoryStatus})
mapper.delete:
delete from t_fun_memory where id in
#{item}
